mapper.sql:
select ui.password , pl.action_time , ui.registration_date , pl.action_type , pl.target_object , ui.phone_number , pl.permission_log_id , pl.user_info_id , pl.change_content , ui.username
FROM permission_log pl left join user_info ui on pl.user_info_id = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select ui.password , pl.action_time , ui.registration_date , pl.action_type , pl.target_object , ui.phone_number , pl.permission_log_id , pl.user_info_id , pl.change_content , ui.username
FROM permission_log pl left join
user_info
ui on pl.user_info_id = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
